title: Big Globe - Dungeon Now Loading Compatibility
description: Big Globe - Dungeon Now Loading Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-dungeon-now-loading-compatibility)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [Dungeon Now Loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading), makes structure generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))

![Dungeon Now Loading Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3825e92465460497332c40cba26c58dd754bd953_0.webp)

In this structure you commonly find the map for the Dungeon Now Loading
![In this structure you commonly find the map for the Dungeon Now Loading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8cc91897057d3ef174511833d4795d4f5d16614_0.webp)
